2605.12227.title: Combining On-Policy Optimization and Distillation for Long-Context Reasoning in Large Language Models
2605.12227.paper_summary: Adapting large language models (LLMs) to long-context tasks requires post-training methods that remain accurate and coherent over thousands of tokens. Existing approaches are limited in several ways: 1) off-policy methods such as supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and knowledge distillation (KD) suffer from exposure bias and limited recovery from model-generated errors over long horizons; 2) on-policy reinforcement learning methods such as Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) better align training with model-generated states, but are unstable and sample-inefficient due to sparse rewards; 3) on-policy distillation (OPD) provides dense token-level guidance, but does not directly optimize arbitrary reward signals. In this paper, we propose Distilled Group Relative Policy Optimization (dGRPO), a method for long-context reasoning that augments GRPO with dense guidance from a stronger teacher via OPD. We also introduce LongBlocks, a synthetic long-context dataset spanning multi-hop reasoning, contextual grounding, and long-form generation. We conduct extensive experiments and ablations comparing off-policy training, sparse-reward GRPO, and our combined approach, leading to an improved recipe for long-context alignment. Overall, our results show that combining outcome-based policy optimization with knowledge distillation in a single objective provides a more stable and effective path to long-context reasoning, while preserving short-context capabilities.
2605.12227.paper_summary_zh: 適應大型語言模型（LLMs）以應對長上下文任務需要後訓練方法，這些方法在數千個標記中仍然保持準確性和連貫性。現有的方法在幾個方面受到限制：1）離線策略方法，如監督微調（SFT）和知識蒸餾（KD），受到暴露偏差的影響，並且在長期內從模型生成的錯誤中恢復的能力有限；2）在線策略強化學習方法，如群體相對策略優化（GRPO），更好地將訓練與模型生成的狀態對齊，但由於稀疏獎勵而不穩定且樣本效率低；3）在線蒸餾（OPD）提供密集的標記級指導，但並不直接優化任意的獎勵信號。在本文中，我們提出了蒸餾群體相對策略優化（dGRPO），這是一種增強GRPO的長上下文推理方法，通過OPD從更強的教師獲得密集指導。我們還介紹了LongBlocks，一個合成的長上下文數據集，涵蓋多跳推理、上下文基礎和長篇生成。我們進行了廣泛的實驗和消融研究，將離線訓練、稀疏獎勵GRPO和我們的結合方法進行比較，從而得出改進的長上下文對齊方案。總的來說，我們的結果顯示，將基於結果的策略優化與知識蒸餾結合在單一目標中，提供了一條更穩定和有效的長上下文推理之路，同時保留短上下文的能力。
2605.12227.author: Miguel Moura Ramos et.al.
2605.12227.authors: Miguel Moura Ramos, Duarte M. Alves, André F. T. Martins
